title: Behavior Ranged Attack
description: Allows the mob to use ranged attacks like shooting arrows.

attack_interval_max.description: Maximum time in ticks between attacks.

attack_interval_min.description: Minimum time in ticks between attacks.

attack_radius.description: Maximum distance in blocks at which the entity will attack.

burst_interval.description: Time in seconds between bursts of shots.

charge_charged_trigger.description: Charge time in seconds at which a charged trigger fires.

charge_shoot_trigger.description: Charge time in seconds at which a shoot trigger fires.

ranged_fov.description: Field of view, in degrees, within which the entity can perform the ranged attack.

speed_multiplier.description: Movement speed multiplier while chasing the target.
